findings.description: A literal URL for DSCA stakeholder work group presentations appears as plain text in the HTML without being wrapped in an <a href> tag.
findings.evidence:
HTML contains: "https://www.deq.nc.gov/about/divisions/waste-management/superfund-section/dry-cleaning-solvent-cleanup-act-program/dsca-stakeholder-work-group-information" as plain text inside a

element, not linked.
